causes.message: Container 'api' has a liveness probe configured and recently evaluated by kubelet
Kubelet liveness checks are failing and triggering restarts
Kubelet restarted the container after failed liveness checks
The workload remains unstable because the container cannot stay healthy long enough to avoid restart pressure

likely_causes: The liveness probe path, command, or port does not match the application's real health behavior
The application becomes unhealthy after startup and fails kubelet liveness checks
Probe timeoutSeconds or failureThreshold is too strict for the container's runtime behavior
suggested_checks: Review livenessProbe path, port, command, timeoutSeconds, and failureThreshold
